formulae.bitplane: concatenate all bit j values before bit j+1; a permutation of the same bits
formulae.causal_identification: same values + same bits + same length; only serialization locality changes
formulae.standard: concatenate coefficient bits little-endian at width d

scope_note: This isolates sensitivity of CASI/F8-O to bijective serialization. It does not observe pre-compression ML-KEM coefficients and makes no IND-CPA/IND-CCA or key-recovery claim.
